creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 186456
update sysutils/vagrant to 2.0.0

vagrant 2.0.0 has been released.
Attached patch updates the port and adds a trivial fix to the ssh ssh_communicator: the name of a parameter in the net-ssh ruby module has been changed, and using the old name is deprecated and results in a lot of warnings.

Patch passes poudriere and the updated vagrant works just fine.
